task_completion.description: Open and read the Target of Opportunity alert file to obtain the target coordinates and observation specifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Documents/ATel_alert_Mrk421.txt'.

task_completion.description: Point the telescope to the specified target, Markarian 421.
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars sky map centered on Markarian 421 (Mrk 421), or the Ekos Mount module showing the telescope's current coordinates matching RA ~11h 04m and Dec ~+38d 12m.

task_completion.description: Set up the multi-band optical observation sequence with the required filters and exposure counts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos Capture module showing a sequence queue configured with 'B', 'V', and 'R' filters, with the count set to at least 5 for each filter, and the target directory set to '/home/ga/Images/ToO/Mrk421'.

task_completion.description: Run the capture sequence to acquire the FITS images.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos Capture module showing the sequence actively running or completed, or a file manager showing multiple .fits files successfully saved in the '/home/ga/Images/ToO/Mrk421' directory.

task_completion.description: Capture and save the context image for the observation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager showing the file 'xray_context.png' in the '/home/ga/Images/ToO/Mrk421' directory, or an image viewer displaying this saved context image.

task_completion.description: Draft the observation response telegram reporting the findings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open with the file '/home/ga/Documents/ATel_response.txt' containing a drafted message that reports the successful observation of Mrk 421.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the KStars/Ekos GUI to perform the telescope operations.
integrity.visual_evidence: KStars and Ekos graphical interfaces should be visible in the screenshots, showing genuine interaction with the observatory control software rather than bypassing it with terminal scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that actual images were captured rather than empty files created.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Ekos capture preview or KStars FITS Viewer should display actual astronomical image data (e.g., star fields), proving the camera simulator was used, rather than just using 'touch' to create empty files.

integrity.description: Verify the response telegram is originally drafted and not just a copy of the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in 'ATel_response.txt' should read like an actual observation report (e.g., confirming the capture of B, V, R bands for Mrk 421), not just a direct copy-paste of the task instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: Markarian 421 (Mrk 421). Coordinates: RA 11h 04m 27s (11.0741h), Dec +38d 12m 32s (38.2089 deg). Required filters: B, V, R (minimum 5 exposures each). Image save directory: /home/ga/Images/ToO/Mrk421. Context image path: /home/ga/Images/ToO/Mrk421/xray_context.png. Response telegram path: /home/ga/Documents/ATel_response.txt.
